ValidationRule.description: Prevents an opportunity from advancing to Negotiation unless the MEDDICC Composite Score is 65 or above. All seven score fields must also be populated.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Negotiation/Review"), OR( ISNULL(MEDDICC_Composite_Score__c), MEDDICC_Composite_Score__c < 65, ISPICKVAL(MEDDICC_Metrics_Score__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(MEDDICC_Economic_Buyer_Score__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(MEDDICC_Decision_Criteria_Score__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(MEDDICC_Decision_Process_Score__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(MEDDICC_Identified_Pain_Score__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(MEDDICC_Champion_Score__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(MEDDICC_Competition_Score__c, "") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To advance to Negotiation, all seven MEDDICC elements must be scored and the Composite Score must be 65 or above. Review deal qualification with your manager before advancing.
